{{CargoOrgan
|name=Frostbound Gaze
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10677
|idx=34
|description=When it locks eyes with its enemy, time and space themselves seem to freeze. Frost forms on the body, and the mind begins to drift into cold oblivion…
|skill=Before round start, summon a snow storm, reducing the enemy's DEF by 36% this round!
|hp=1420
|def=120
|atk=120
|rush=249
|gene1=In Fissure combat, Water DMG +120
|gene2=Wind RES +60
|gene3=When weakness is spotted, CRIT +7%
|gene4=Extra RUSH DMG +200
|gene7=Water DMG +180 (Awakened)
|}}
